# ZUI — @zui.react/zui v0.8.0

Modern React component library. All exports come from a single barrel:

    import { Button, Card, … } from '@zui.react/zui';
    import '@zui.react/zui/styles.css';

## Getting started

- Introduction — A modern React component library focused on speed, polish, and motion.
- Installation — How to add ZUI to your project.
- Theming — Three themes share one token system. Switch via class on <html>.

## Components

- Button — Interactive button with 9 variants, 4 sizes, loading state, and asChild.
- Input — Text input with prefix, suffix, validation, and three sizes.
- Card — Content container with 9 variants — flat, elevated, glow, glass, featured.
- Dialog — Modal layer with focus trap, scroll lock, and animated overlay.
- Toast — Notifications with queue management, swipe-to-dismiss, and auto-dismiss.
- Tabs — Tabbed navigation with animated underline indicator.
- Accordion — Collapsible content sections with smooth height animation.
- Select — Dropdown selector with keyboard nav, type-ahead, and groups.
- Switch — Animated toggle with 3 sizes and 4 color tones.
- Badge — Status pill with 8 semantic tones and 3 shapes.
- Avatar — User avatar with image, fallback initials, and status indicator.
- Segmented Control (new) — Pill-shaped segmented selector for view-mode / scope toggles.

## Effects

- Marquee (new) — Endless scrolling row of items. Pure CSS, GPU-only.
- Border Beam (new) — Animated light that travels along an element border.
- Shine Border (new) — Conic-gradient border that rotates around the card.
- Number Ticker (new) — Smoothly counts up to a target value when in view.
- Magic Card (new) — Card with a soft spotlight that follows the cursor.
- Dock (new) — macOS-style dock with cursor-aware magnification.

## Patterns

- Filter Panel — Multi-step filter card with sub-panels, search, and chips.
- Project Detail — Property list + activity feed sheet for project records.
- Share Panel — Recipient list with permission pickers and link sharing.
- Sign In Card (new) — Stacked sign-in modal with social providers + email + SSO.
- Login Split (new) — Side-by-side login layout — clean and glassmorphism variants.

## AI

- AI Prompt (new) — Multi-mode AI composer — compose, follow-up, model picker, tools.
- AI Dropzone (new) — Dashed-border drop area with quick actions and a file preview.
- AI Recorder (new) — Voice-note pill — cancel, blinking dot, timer, pause, confirm.
- AI Greeting (new) — Hub greeting with orb, suggested cards, and quick action pills.
- AI Message (new) — Chat bubble for user / assistant / system with reactions.
- AI Generating (new) — Streaming card with shader-style header, caret, and action chips.
- Content Generator (new) — Three-pane content gen layout — fields, controls, history of outputs.

## 3D

- Action 3D (new) — Raised neumorphic CTA pill with icon and chevron wells.
- Switch 3D (new) — Recessed track + raised pill thumb. ON/OFF labels.
- Image Card 3D (new) — Image with a floating glassy tag in the corner.
- Plan Card 3D (new) — Pricing card with 5 tones, badge, features, and a raised CTA.
- Menu List 3D (new) — Profile menu with avatar, progress bar, and inset rows.
- Job Card Stack (new) — Tilted pile of pastel job cards with brand logos and tags.
- Track Delivery (new) — Status card with an isometric box-on-conveyor SVG illustration.
- Travel Card (new) — Phone-aspect image card with location, fare and search CTA.
- Install Card (new) — Product card with isometric shapes illustration and install count.
- Pricing Dark (new) — Dark glassy pricing tier with abstract scribble illustration.
- Stats Card (new) — Dark sales card with breakdown rows and a sparkline chart.
- Talent Grid (new) — Tilted grid of talent cards with avatar, role badge and skills.

## Ecommerce

- Product Card — Product tile with image, badge, tags, price, and add-to-cart.
- Cart Item — Single line in a shopping cart — image, qty stepper, price, remove.
- Order Summary — Sub-totals, coupon, total, and checkout CTA. Includes a dark variant.
- Payment Method Picker — Radio-card list of payment methods (cards, wallets, BNPL).
- Credit Card Form — Name, number, expiry, CVC with auto-formatting.
- Shipping Option — Carrier-aware delivery picker with ETA and badges.
- Checkout Stepper — Progress indicator across cart → payment → review.
- Promo Code — Inline coupon input with apply state.
- Quantity Stepper — Plus/minus quantity control. Used inside CartItem.
- Price Tag — Price text with optional strikethrough original.
